name: AI Audio
description: Audio embedding and classification capability contributions for AI runs.
author: skier233

tutorialTopics.title: AI Audio
tutorialTopics.description: Audio embeddings, classification, and video similarity workflows.

slides.imageAlt: Audio similarity results after running audio analysis
slides.title: Find videos that sound alike
slides.caption: Run AI with audio analysis on videos that have usable sound. AI Audio learns how each video sounds so it can surface others that are sonically similar.
slides.bodyMarkdown: Audio similarity is great for matching the same scene, soundtrack, or audio source across different videos — signals that visual search alone would miss. Run it on videos with real audio for the best results.

slides.imageAlt: The Audio Similar tab with ranked matches
slides.title: Open the Audio Similar tab
slides.caption: On a video's detail page, choose the Audio Similar tab to see other videos that sound like this one, each ranked by match percentage.
slides.bodyMarkdown: Combine it with **Visual** similarity and **tag** filters to zero in on exactly the content you're after — for example, look‑alike *and* sound‑alike videos.
